name: Oaklee Petersen
ai_summary: Oaklee Petersen has two years of formal daycare experience with infants through preschool and is available full-time with flexible scheduling across any day or time. She practices patient conflict resolution by physically separating children and redirecting behavior, and she excels at nurturing creativity while supporting each child's individual developmental goals.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Oakley Peterson. I used to work at a daycare for almost two years. I loved working there, I loved working with kids. I worked in ages infants To Toddlers and sometimes I would be in preschool.
 And I just loved it.
transcripts.q4:
I live in Layton Utah and I'm willing to travel 30 minutes
 Maybe even 40.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for full-time but I'm open to part-time. I'm available any day any time.
transcripts.q6: My way of dealing with the conflict between children, is I first split them up and I redirect the one that's hitting and try to show them. That's not, like tell them. That's not okay. And we need to put our hands on something yet, focus. Our hands on a different activity, not hitting, or kicking or anything like that.
transcripts.q7: I would make a great up to teacher because I'm very patient and I'm good with any age and I just love working with kids. I love bringing out their creativity and helping them with their goals.
